navigation.instructions: Must include brand name, 4 main links (Villa, Gallery, Activities, Location), and primary CTA 'Inquire'. Do not hide desktop links behind hamburger.

gallery.filtering: Use shadcn Tabs to switch between 'All', 'Bedrooms', 'Outdoor', 'Pool'.

contact_form.layout: 2-column bento: left side text/info, right side shadcn form

hero_image.description: Mediterranean Villa terrace overlooking the ocean

pool_images.description: Large swimming pool next to ocean

activity_images.description: Scuba diving in clear blue sea water

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Text color changes explicitly on hover. Buttons should lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and gain shadow.
interactions_and_motion.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion for fade-up on scroll with stagger for grid items.
interactions_and_motion.smooth_scroll: Implement lenis for smooth scrolling across the page.

iconography.style: Thin or Light weight, matching the elegant organic aesthetic. Use for amenities and activities.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. e.g., data-testid='booking-inquiry-submit'

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a one-page or multi-section landing page for Villa Kephala.
Install and use 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' fonts from Google Fonts.
Implement the 'Tetris Grid' pattern for the Photo Gallery using framer-motion for entrance animations. Group the images using shadcn Tabs to separate 'Bedrooms', 'Pool', and 'Outdoor Spaces'.
In the Activities section, showcase hiking, beaches, historical sites, scuba diving, and cycling using cards with images and short text.
Create a Contact form section at the bottom for inquiries (booking method). Use Shadcn Form, Input, Textarea.
Include an interactive map section showing the villa location in Kea. Use a static map image or an iframe of Kea, Greece wrapped in a clean component.
Ensure generous spacing (py-24 or py-32) between major sections.
Include an Amenities list with icons for the 'Quick amenities points'.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout and Shadcn for interactive pieces (Tabs, Forms).
Add 'lenis' library for smooth scrolling if possible, otherwise use CSS smooth scroll.
